_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: we also examined blood vessels using CD31 immunohistochemistry, revealing a significant reduction in neoangiogenesis in cabozantinib-treated tumors versus vehicle control
details: CD31 immunohistochemistry revealed a significant reduction in neoangiogenesis in cabozantinib-treated tumors versus vehicle control
